The '''Plains of Coruscant''' was an area of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] located near the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. The "plains" description of the area was due to its relative flatness created by millions of flat-topped skyscrapers packed closely together, with various skyscrapers sticking out above this surface.

It was the location of the [[Galactic Courts of Justice/Legends|Galactic Courts of Justice Building]] and [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]]' favorite restaurant. Some more notable buildings included the [[Diplomat Hotel/Legends|Diplomat Hotel]] and the [[City Municipal Authorities Building/Legends|Municipal Authorities Building]].
